title: Apothecary Jar Reagent Bottle, 250ml Amber Glass Storage Jar with Lid, Reusable Vintage Refillable Container for Herbs, Spices, Oils, Bath Salts, Lotion, Perfume
features: CAPACITY - The apothecary jar holds up to 250ml approximately. It comes with a secure lid and can be filled with oils, powders, spices, flowers, or other materials.
PREMIUM MATERIALS - Made from high-quality, durable amber glass that protects contents from harmful UV rays, preserving the integrity and potency of your stored items.
VERSATILE STORAGE - Ideal for essential oils, herbs, spices, bath salts, and other small items. Perfect for both home use and professional settings such as spas and apothecaries.
VINTAGE AESTHETIC - The classic design of this apothecary jar adds a timeless, elegant touch to your decor, making it suitable for modern houses, bathrooms, kitchen sinks and even hotel rooms.
PRODUCT DIMENSIONS - Each bottle has a size of H: 12 x W: 7 x D: 7cm ( Approximately )
description: Product Description Enhance your home with the timeless elegance of the UNIQUE HOME LIVING Apothecary Jar Reagent Bottle. These vintage-inspired glass storage jars are designed to preserve the freshness and quality of your stored items. Made from durable, thick glass, these jars come with a secure, airtight lid to protect your contents from moisture and dust. Available in a range of stylish colors—Amber, Black, and Grey—and various sizes (125ml, 250ml, 500ml, 1000ml), they are perfect for organizing your herbs, spices, essential oils, bath salts, lotions, perfumes, and more. Whether used in the kitchen, bathroom, or as a charming addition to your apothecary collection, these jars combine functionality with a classic vintage aesthetic. The refillable design not only helps reduce plastic waste but also adds a sophisticated touch to your home décor... Vintage Glass Design for Timeless Elegance Airtight Lid Keeps Contents Fresh and Protected Durable Thick Glass for Long-Lasting Use Ideal for Herbs, Oils, Bath Salts, and More Versatile Use: Kitchen, Bathroom, Apothecary Available in Amber, Black, and Grey Colours Apothecary Jar Reagent Bottle, 125ml Amber Glass Storage J...
